top_signals.title: Trump Says Peace Talks on Track After Israel-Iran Clash Ends
top_signals.summary: US President Donald Trump renewed his claims of momentum toward ending the conflict with Iran, after brokering a halt to hostilities between Israel and the Islamic Republic and easing tensions that had threatened to derail broader peace efforts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kuwait Offers Oil to Asian Buyers for First Time Since War
top_signals.summary: Kuwait is offering to sell its crude to refiners in Asia for the first time since the Iran war started, the latest indication of rising oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says sovereign AI is Nvidia's powerful new growth driver
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Nvidia's growing sovereign AI business could help reduce the company's dependence on hyperscalers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: Gold steady as lower oil offsets US rate-hike fears  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin's bounce isn't a bullish revival, with anything from $68,000 to $80,000 seen as a marker
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Armenia’s pro-Europe party wins election despite Russia-linked disinformation
top_signals.summary: Pashinyan's Civil Contract party won nearly 50% of Sunday's vote, defeating the pro-Russian Strong Armenia party led by Russian-Armenian billionaire Samvel Karapetyan, which received around 23% of the vote.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: French Army has recruitment surplus but lacks equipment, deputy chief says
top_signals.summary: “This year, we’re already slowing down recruitment because not only are we recruiting better, but we’re retaining people better," a service leader said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
